quests.name: Into the Sands
quests.description: The Great Desert buries the road to the tomb. Clear a path and save who you can.

objectives.description: Escort the lost caravan to safety

dialogueStart: The tomb lies beneath the deep dunes. Marauders pick at anyone who nears it.
A caravan is stranded out there. Clear the marauders and lead the survivors back.
dialogueCompletion: The caravan is safe, and they've mapped the dunes to the tomb.
Sand conjurers guard the entrance. Break them, and the tomb opens.

quests.name: The Tomb's Wards
quests.description: Destroy the sand conjurers holding the tomb's wards shut.
dialogueStart: The conjurers weave the wards that seal the tomb. Unravel them.
They call marauders from the sand — end them fast, before you're buried.
dialogueCompletion: The wards fall. The Tomb of Nefertari stands open.
This is where it began — and where it ends. Go down, {player}. Face the Pharaoh.

quests.name: The Pharaoh's Tomb
quests.description: Descend into the tomb and destroy Pharaoh Nefertari — the source of the rising dark.

objectives.description: Complete the run: Tomb of Nefertari (defeat the Pharaoh)

dialogueStart: Everything led here. The seals, the temples, the frost, the sun — all of it fed the Pharaoh's return.
Take a party or go alone. But end her, and end this.
dialogueCompletion: The Pharaoh is dust. The dark that gathered across the realm loosens its grip.
You've done what no watchman, no order, no god could. The campaign is won, {player} — but the deepest tombs are only now waking. The endgame begins.
